description: Explains that loans are only available to salaried individuals.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Thank you for reaching out. Please note that InstaMoney personal loans are currently available exclusively for full-time salaried employees. Self-employed individuals, freelancers, and business owners are not eligible at this stage. You must have a regular salary credit from a registered firm to apply.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Explains the minimum income requirement of INR 20,000.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

To be eligible for an InstaMoney loan, your net monthly take-home salary must be at least INR 20,000. This income must be credited directly to your bank account via bank transfer. Cash salary or cheques are not accepted as valid income proof.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

InstaMoney loans are eligible for applicants aged between 21 and 55 years at the time of application. Unfortunately, applicants below 21 or above 55 years of age cannot be processed by our system.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

We require a minimum credit score of 600 (CIBIL or equivalent) for loan approval. Additionally, applicants should not have any payment defaults or active write-offs in the last 12 months.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

InstaMoney loans feature a flat interest rate ranging from 24% to 36% per annum (p.a.). Your specific interest rate is determined by our internal credit scoring system based on your risk profile, credit score, and financial documents.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

We offer flexible loan repayment tenures starting from 3 months up to 12 months. You can select your preferred repayment tenure during the loan offer acceptance phase in the app.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

You can preclose your InstaMoney loan without any foreclosure charges after successfully paying at least 3 consecutive EMIs. If you choose to foreclose before 3 EMIs, a standard foreclosure fee of 3% on the outstanding principal will apply.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

A non-refundable processing fee of 2% to 5% of the approved loan amount is charged. This fee is deducted upfront from your loan amount during disbursal, meaning you will receive the approved loan minus this fee.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

To avoid late fees, please ensure your EMIs are paid on time. Delayed payments incur a daily penalty of 2% of the outstanding EMI amount. Additionally, a flat bouncing charge of INR 500 is levied for any auto-debit (e-mandate) failure.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

A flat platform convenience fee of INR 199 is applicable to all disbursed InstaMoney loans. This is charged to cover digital platform operational costs and is standard across all loan bookings.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Once your loan agreement is digitally signed and the auto-debit setup is complete, the loan amount is transferred directly to your bank account within 2 hours. Funds are usually processed instantly.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

We apologize for the delay. Sometimes bank transfers take longer due to server traffic or banking network congestion. If you have signed the agreement and haven't received funds in 24 hours, please share your transaction ID or registered mobile number so we can check immediately.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

To process your loan, you must upload a clear scanned copy of your PAN Card (mandatory for credit assessment) and your Aadhaar Card. Ensure details like name and birthdate match exactly across both documents.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

You must provide your salary account bank statement for the last 3 months in PDF format. This statement should clearly show your monthly salary credits, name, account number, and transaction history. Uploading it via Net Banking is also supported for faster verification.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Please upload the salary slip for your latest working month. The salary slip must display the company name, your name, designation, net salary, and deductions clearly. A PDF or a clean photo is accepted.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

We appreciate your interest in InstaMoney. However, our credit criteria currently only allow us to serve full-time salaried professionals. We do not offer personal loans to self-employed individuals, business owners, or freelancers at this time.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Addresses cases where salary is not received via bank transfer.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

To qualify for an InstaMoney loan, your monthly salary must be credited via direct online bank transfer (NEFT/IMPS/UPI) by your employer. We cannot accept salary payments received in cash, hand delivery, or via cheque.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

If you are facing app loading errors, please try these troubleshooting steps:
1. Clear the app cache and data from your phone settings.
2. Ensure you are using the latest version of the InstaMoney app from the Google Play Store.
3. Switch between Wi-Fi and mobile data to check internet stability.
If the issue persists, please send a screenshot of the error to our support team.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Your bank verification failed, which usually happens due to mismatching name details between your bank account and PAN, or incorrect IFSC/Account number entries. Please double-check your bank details in the app or upload a cancelled cheque to help us verify your account manually.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

To ensure timely repayment, setting up auto-debit (e-mandate/eNACH) is a mandatory step before loan disbursement. You can register your e-mandate using Net Banking credentials or your Debit Card through the secure link in the app. This automates your monthly EMI payments on the due date.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

You can request loan cancellation within 24 hours of disbursement, provided the funds have not been utilized. You must refund the exact disbursed amount to our official account, after which we will process the cancellation. Note that processing fees are non-refundable.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Explains how to get a No Objection Certificate.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Once your loan is fully closed and all EMIs are successfully paid, your No Objection Certificate (NOC) is automatically generated. You can download your NOC directly from the 'My Loans' section in the InstaMoney app within 7 business days of final payment.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Provides info on manual payment links.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

If auto-debit fails or you wish to make a manual payment, you can generate a secure repayment link directly from the app. Alternatively, log in to our web portal, navigate to the active loan dashboard, and use UPI, Net Banking, or Debit Card to complete your payment.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Explains refund process for excess payments.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

If your bank account was debited twice or you made an excess payment, please share your bank statement showing both deductions. Once verified by our finance team, the excess amount will be refunded to your original bank account within 3 to 5 business days.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Explains the policy on changing EMI due dates.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

We apologize, but we do not support changing or postponing your EMI due date after the loan is disbursed. The repayment schedule is fixed at the time of agreement signing to match bank mandate rules. Please ensure sufficient balance on your scheduled date to avoid penalties.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

InstaMoney loans do not support partial or part-payments during the loan tenure. You can either pay your standard monthly EMIs as per the schedule, or make a full foreclosure payment to close the loan account entirely after paying at least 3 EMIs.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Details how to increase loan limits.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Your loan limit is evaluated automatically based on your repayment track record. Successfully paying your current loan EMIs on time will improve your internal credit rating and make you eligible for a higher limit (up to INR 25,000) on your next loan application.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

You can earn rewards by referring your friends to InstaMoney! Share your unique referral code from the 'Refer & Earn' section of the app. Once your referred friend successfully registers and accepts a loan, referral bonus points will be credited to your account.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Details the cooldown period after loan rejection.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

If your loan application was rejected, there is a standard 90-day cooldown period before you can reapply. This time allows you to improve your credit score and clear any outstanding dues. You will see the reapply option active in the app after 90 days.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Details rules for applying for multiple concurrent loans.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

We do not support multiple active loans at the same time. You must fully repay and close your current active InstaMoney loan before you can apply for a new loan on the platform.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Overview of the IM+ investment product.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

IM+ is our premium Peer-to-Peer (P2P) investment portfolio product. Instead of lending to one individual, your capital is automatically diversified across hundreds of verified borrowers using our auto-allocation technology. This helps secure stable returns while mitigating default risks.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

IM+ portfolios offer net expected returns ranging from 12% to 15% per annum. Interest is calculated based on monthly borrower repayments and credited directly to your escrow account. Actual returns depend on your portfolio selection and default rates.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Details of the Conservative risk portfolio.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

The Conservative Portfolio under IM+ focuses on low-risk profiles, lending exclusively to prime borrowers with credit scores above 750. It yields an expected stable net return of approximately 12% p.a., minimizing credit default risk.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Details of the Moderate risk portfolio.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

The Moderate Portfolio balances capital growth and risk exposure, distributing funds between prime and sub-prime verified borrowers. It targets expected net returns of 13% to 14% p.a., matching average market yield structures.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Details of the Aggressive risk portfolio.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

The Aggressive Portfolio maximizes yield potential by lending to higher-risk, sub-prime borrowers. It offers the highest expected net returns of up to 15% p.a., but experiences higher default rate fluctuations.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

All IM+ investment portfolios are subject to a mandatory 3-month lock-in period starting from the date of portfolio activation. During this lock-in period, you cannot withdraw or request liquidation of your invested principal.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

You can request premature liquidation of your IM+ portfolio after the 3-month lock-in period. Please note that an early exit liquidating fee of 1% of the total portfolio value will be applicable. Full withdrawals at maturity are free of charges.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Once a liquidation request is submitted, it takes 2 to 5 business days for our matching engine to transfer the loans to other active investors. The funds are then credited to your escrow account and can be moved to your linked bank account.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

IM+ supports two return models:
1. Payout Model: Interest earned is credited to your escrow account monthly, allowing regular cash flows.
2. Reinvestment Model: Interest earned is automatically reinvested to compound your portfolio yields. You can toggle this setting in your portfolio configuration page.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

To ensure safety and transparency as per RBI guidelines, all investor funds are held in a secure Escrow Account managed by an independent Trustee bank. All lending and repayment transactions pass directly through this escrow account, completely isolated from LenDenClub's operating accounts.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

As per Indian Tax Laws, interest earned from P2P lending is classified as 'Income from Other Sources' and taxed according to your individual income tax slab. We do not deduct TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) on repayments. We provide an annual interest statement in your dashboard for your ITR filings.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

According to Reserve Bank of India (RBI) regulations for P2P platforms, the aggregate investment limit for a single investor across all P2P platforms combined cannot exceed INR 50,00,000. Investors investing more than INR 10,00,000 must submit a net worth certificate signed by a Chartered Accountant.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Addresses risk of default and mitigation.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

While P2P lending carries credit risk, IM+ mitigates default risk by automatically diversifying your capital across hundreds of borrowers in small tranches (INR 50 - 100). Thus, if a single borrower defaults, it only impacts a fraction of a percent of your total portfolio value.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

The minimum starting capital required for an IM+ portfolio is INR 10,000. The maximum investment is subject to the RBI cap of INR 50,00,000 across all peer-to-peer lending platforms in India.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Explains how to withdraw idle escrow funds.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

You can withdraw idle or unallocated funds from your escrow account back to your registered bank account at any time. Simply go to the 'Wallet' section of your investor dashboard and click 'Withdraw'. Transfers take 1 business day to process.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Yes, you can create and manage multiple investment portfolios with different risk profiles (e.g., one Conservative portfolio for stability and one Aggressive portfolio for higher yields) under the same LenDenClub account.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Explains adding funds to an existing portfolio.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

You can top up or add funds to your active IM+ portfolio at any time. The added funds will be automatically queued and diversified across new borrowers by our matching engine during the next batch allocation.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear {{customer_name}},

Our auto-diversification engine ensures that your investment is fractionalized. For example, a deposit of INR 20,000 will be split and distributed in units of INR 100 across 200 distinct borrowers. This prevents default concentration and ensures stable yields.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

description: Explains how to get investment reports.
text_payload:
Dear {{customer_name}},

You can download monthly account statements, interest statements, and borrower ledger reports from the 'Reports' section of your investor dashboard. These are available in both PDF and Excel formats.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Investor Support Team

Dear Customer,

We noticed your KYC/identity verification failed. This usually occurs if the uploaded documents are blurry or if the name/birthdate details on your PAN Card do not match your Aadhaar Card. Please re-upload clear photos or contact our support desk to update your details.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Provides contact channels and support timings.
text_payload:
Dear Customer,

You can contact our customer support team via email at support@lendenclub.com or call our toll-free number 1800-XXX-XXXX between 9:00 AM and 6:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. We are closed on public holidays.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Explains how to update account details.
text_payload:
Dear Customer,

To update your registered email address or phone number, please navigate to 'Account Settings' in the app and submit an OTP verified request. For bank details changes, you must upload a cancelled cheque showing your name for validation.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear Customer,

Peer-to-Peer (P2P) lending is a financial model that directly connects individual borrowers seeking loans with individual/institutional investors seeking attractive returns. LenDenClub acts as a technology platform and RBI-registered NBFC-P2P facilitating this connection, credit-scoring the borrowers, and collecting repayments.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

Dear Customer,

To permanently close and delete your LenDenClub account, ensure you have no active loans or outstanding investment portfolios. If all accounts are cleared, please email support@lendenclub.com with your registered details requesting closure, and we will delete your account within 3 business days.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team

description: Troubleshoots login and password reset issues.
text_payload:
Dear Customer,

If you are unable to log in, please click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen to receive a password reset link via your registered email or phone number. If you are not receiving OTPs, verify that your mobile network is working and promotional SMS are not blocked on your phone.

Best regards,
LenDenClub Customer Support Team
